title: andropogon sorghum subvar. rubens
intro: Andropogon sorghum subvar. rubens, also known as sweet flag or calamus, is a type of grass belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Andropogon sorghum subvar. rubens include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
